description: Known-good fixture: a small source document (4 bullets) where every bullet traces cleanly to at least one LT in the paired lt_set.json, and every LT traces back to at least one bullet. No invention, no orphans.
bullets: Identify prime numbers and composite numbers within 100.
Find the prime factorisation of whole numbers up to 100.
Compute the greatest common divisor of two whole numbers.
Explain why the greatest common divisor is useful when simplifying fractions.
